readme.en:
# CLIP Benchmark

## Overview

CLIP Benchmark evaluates vision-language models on zero-shot image classification and image-text retrieval tasks. It uses the pre-trained CLIP model architecture to match images with text descriptions without task-specific fine-tuning.

## Task Description

- **Task Type**: Zero-shot image classification + image-text retrieval
- **Input**: Images + text label descriptions
- **Output**: Predicted labels via embedding similarity matching
- **Evaluation**: Accuracy (classification), Recall@k (retrieval)

## Key Features

- 40+ standard vision datasets spanning natural images, textures, satellite imagery
- Zero-shot evaluation: no training on target datasets required
- Supports both classification (accuracy) and retrieval (recall@1/5/10)
- Works with any OpenAI CLIP-compatible model (ViT-B/32, ViT-L/14, etc.)

## Evaluation Notes

- Requires CLIP model checkpoint (HuggingFace or local path)
- Batch size configurable for VRAM optimization
- Limit parameter controls samples per dataset
- Metrics: top-1 accuracy (classification), recall@k (retrieval)

## Properties

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| **Tool** | CLIP Benchmark |
| **Category** | Vision-Language Evaluation |
| **Datasets** | 40+ |
| **Metrics** | accuracy, recall_at_1, recall_at_5, recall_at_10 |

## Data Statistics

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Total Datasets | 40+ |
| Notable Datasets | ImageNet, CIFAR-100, Flickr30k, MSCOCO, Caltech101 |
| Task Types | Classification, Retrieval |
readme.zh:
# CLIP Benchmark

## 概述

CLIP Benchmark 评估视觉语言模型在零样本图像分类和图像文本检索任务上的表现。它使用预训练的 CLIP 模型架构，无需任务特定微调即可匹配图像与文本描述。

## 任务描述

- **任务类型**: 零样本图像分类 + 图像文本检索
- **输入**: 图像 + 文本标签描述
- **输出**: 通过 Embedding 相似度匹配预测标签
- **评测方式**: 准确率 (分类), Recall@k (检索)

## 主要特点

- 40+ 标准视觉数据集，涵盖自然图像、纹理、卫星图像
- 零样本评估: 无需在目标数据集上训练
- 支持分类 (准确率) 和检索 (recall@1/5/10)
- 兼容任何 OpenAI CLIP 兼容模型 (ViT-B/32, ViT-L/14 等)

## 评估说明

- 需要 CLIP 模型权重 (HuggingFace 或本地路径)
- 批次大小可配置以优化显存
- Limit 参数控制每个数据集的样本数
- 指标: top-1 准确率 (分类), recall@k (检索)

## 属性

| 属性 | 值 |
|----------|-------|
| **工具** | CLIP Benchmark |
| **类别** | 视觉语言评估 |
| **数据集数量** | 40+ |
| **评估指标** | accuracy, recall_at_1, recall_at_5, recall_at_10 |

## 数据统计

| 指标 | 值 |
|--------|-------|
| 数据集总数 | 40+ |
| 代表性数据集 | ImageNet, CIFAR-100, Flickr30k, MSCOCO, Caltech101 |
| 任务类型 | 分类, 检索 |
